deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "wǔyuán" sounds roughly like "woo-ywan". Say it in 2 beat(s) (wu-yuan) and remember the tones 3-2. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.
deck.mnemonicItalian: Mnemonico pinyin: "wǔyuán" suona circa come "uu-iuan". Dillo in 2 battuta/e (wu-yuan) e ricorda i toni 3-2. Concentrati sul suono e sul ritmo, non sul significato.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "wǒ dài" sounds roughly like "woh-deye". Say it in 2 beat(s) (wo-dai) and remember the tones 3-4. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.
deck.mnemonicItalian: Mnemonico pinyin: "wǒ dài" suona circa come "uo-dai". Dillo in 2 battuta/e (wo-dai) e ricorda i toni 3-4. Concentrati sul suono e sul ritmo, non sul significato.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "báishuǐ" sounds roughly like "beye-shway". Say it in 2 beat(s) (bai-shui) and remember the tones 2-3. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "dì yī kè" sounds roughly like "dee-yee-kuh". Say it in 3 beat(s) (di-yi-ke) and remember the tones 4-1-4. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "yībǎisānshí" sounds roughly like "yee-beye-san-shih". Say it in 4 beat(s) (yi-bai-san-shi) and remember the tones 1-3-1-2. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "sānshíwǔ" sounds roughly like "san-shih-woo". Say it in 3 beat(s) (san-shi-wu) and remember the tones 1-2-3. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.

deck.mnemonicEnglish: Pinyin mnemonic: "nánháir" sounds roughly like "nanhair". Say it in 1 beat(s) (nanhair) and remember the tones 2. Focus on the sound and rhythm, not the meaning.
